buildCommand: npm run build --workspace=@haloframe/shared && npm run build --workspace=@haloframe/web

headers.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://js.stripe.com; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com; img-src 'self' data: blob: https://*.supabase.co https://v3.fal.media https://fal.media https://placehold.co; connect-src 'self' https://*.supabase.co https://api.stripe.com https://v3.fal.media https://fal.media; frame-src https://js.stripe.com https://checkout.stripe.com; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self';
